title: Cogni multi-repo sync manifest (inverse form v2)
description: spec.repo-sync-contract — inverse manifest: declares global excludes + per-artifact divergences (omit_from_artifact + artifact_only). Anything else under hub is expected to mirror 1:1 across all artifacts. Mirrors the CATALOG_IS_SSOT pattern (infra/catalog/_schema.json).

node_local.description: Tier 3 (node identity / presentation) globs — homepage, landing UI, branding/theme, repo-spec, persona. Carved OUT of the node-template→fork Tier-2 substrate merge: node-template is a starter only, so its presentation NEVER overwrites a fork's (spec.repo-sync-contract THREE_TIER_CARVE_OUT). Read at runtime by the operator fork-sync from node-template's copy of this manifest (TIER3_IS_DATA). Distinct axis from divergences[] (hub↔artifact drift).

schema.description: Manifest schema version. Bump = lock-step PRs across all repos per MANIFEST_BOOTSTRAP.

hub.description: GitHub owner/repo of the canonical hub. Per HUB_IS_COGNI_MONOREPO this is cogni-dao/cogni.

visibility.description: public = anonymous clone OK in detector; private = needs PAT (detector skips in v0.1).

exclude.description: Global glob excludes — never propagated to or from any artifact. Junk/caches/build outputs.

omit_from_artifact.description: Globs of paths the hub has but this artifact MUST NOT carry.

artifact_only.description: Globs of paths the artifact has but the hub MUST NOT carry.
